title: Hardcoded Stripe live key + bare except
author: contributor
diff:
--- a/payments.py
+++ b/payments.py
@@ -1,5 +1,22 @@
+import stripe
+
+stripe.api_key = 'sk_live_abc123secretkey'
+
+def charge_card(amount, token):
+    try:
+        charge = stripe.Charge.create(
+            amount=amount,
+            currency='usd',
+            source=token,
+        )
+        return charge
+    except:
+        return None

gold_issues.description: Hardcoded Stripe live key (sk_live_...) in source code. Rotate key and use environment variable.
Bare except silently swallows all exceptions including payment failures.
